form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 12 at Warwick Farm Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 15 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Nitro carrying 57kg at $21. Back for his second prep and the two trials had merit.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 12 at Warwick Farm Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 15 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Nitro carrying 57kg at $21. Back for his second prep and the two trials had merit.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. First starter by Wootton Bassett out of Influencer. Has a total of seven trials prior to his debut today. Will go back from the draw and be ridden for luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. First starter by Wootton Bassett out of Influencer. Has a total of seven trials prior to his debut today. Will go back from the draw and be ridden for luck.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Warwick Farm Mdn October 15 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Chicama with 55.5kg at $16. On debut fourth of 11 at Newcastle F&M Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 1.75 len behind Vexxy with 55.5kg at $17. Will take great benefit from this outing.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 0.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $12. Will derive great benefit from that outing and looks a great chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. At debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 0.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $12. Will derive great benefit from that outing and looks a great chance to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover throughout the race.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Randwick Kensington 3yo F Mdn December 5 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind La Basilique with 58.5kg at $3.30. On debut second of 10 at Murtoa 3yo Mdn-Sw October 4 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Wintery carrying 56kg at $2.35. Expected to feature from the sticky gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Racing first-up today. On debut second of 10 at Murtoa 3yo Mdn-Sw October 4 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Wintery carrying 56kg at $2.35. Expected to feature from the sticky gate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped by Take Flight.
Began awkwardly, bumped the hindquarter of Sunsprite and lost ground.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign 13th of 16 at Caulfield in the G3 Thbrd Club November 15 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Inkaruna carrying 56kg at $61. Previously first up; second of 10 at Newcastle F&M Mdn September 19 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Magenta Skies carrying 59kg at $7. Progressive filly well placed first-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Previously first up; second of 10 at Newcastle F&M Mdn September 19 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Magenta Skies carrying 59kg at $7. Progressive filly well placed first-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 800m, momentarily tightened for room by Quickaz.
Raced keenly in the middle stages after being crossed by Miss Freelove.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Filly by Lonhro facing the starter for the first time. Won trial at Warwick Farm over 816m on March 30. Must respect from the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Filly by Lonhro facing the starter for the first time. Won trial at Warwick Farm over 816m on March 30. Must respect from the low draw.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd in a small field at Sapphire Coast Mdn on March 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Eltrum with 55.5kg at $7. Second run from a spell made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Spanish Artist carrying 55.5kg at $71. This looks much tougher.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today. First-up 2nd in a small field at Sapphire Coast Mdn on March 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Eltrum with 55.5kg at $7. Second run from a spell made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Spanish Artist carrying 55.5kg at $71. This looks much tougher.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.
Bumped with Star of Kyeema at the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Wyong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1100m, on a slow track; neck behind Maluku carrying 55kg at $1.90. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw on September 11 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Jellicious carrying 55.5kg at $4. Sound return and should be right there at the business end.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Second-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Ho Aloha.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 4th in a small field at Wyong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Maluku carrying 55kg at $3.40. Promising type who maps well for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Was well-supported at debut, 4th in a small field at Wyong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Maluku carrying 55kg at $3.40. Promising type who maps well for this.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up today. Last outing 4th of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, slow going 1.4 len behind Borjnord carrying 56.5kg at $8. At only start last preparation 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 2yo F Mdn-Sw on July 2 over 1200m, in the wet; 6 len behind Tomato Toastie carrying 56kg at $21. Capable of building on that performance and she looks one of the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Dual acceptor. Second-up today. Capable of building on that performance and she looks one of the main chances.

form.formComment: Michael Freedman trained three-year-old filly lining up for debut. Winner of her most recent trial. Betting the best guide.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Michael Freedman trained three-year-old filly lining up for debut. Winner of her most recent trial. Betting the best guide.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after five months got back early 6th of 8 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn on March 17 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Frostisen with 56.5kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on October 9 over 1100m, 9 len behind Nesrine carrying 55kg at $61. Hard to get excited about her chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted in and made contact with Into Brooklyn.
Near the 900m, inconvenienced by Young Mister Grace.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Frosted - All Ours) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to her debut today. Seventh over 900m in a Rosehill trial on March 24. Later on.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly (Frosted - All Ours) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to her debut today. Seventh over 900m in a Rosehill trial on March 24. Later on.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Brad Widdup trained two-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Progressing well with a recent trial win. Nice type worth consideration on debut.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Brad Widdup trained two-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Progressing well with a recent trial win. Nice type worth consideration on debut.
